Indian Wells: 6 Dominant Moments in Iga Swiatek’s Win

Iga Swiatek once again showed her dominance on the court with a strong performance at Indian Wells.

Her powerful groundstrokes, strategic shot selection, and mental strength helped her control key moments throughout the match.

The victory highlights Swiatek’s continued excellence on the WTA Tour.
